{{Quote|I am the vizier of the court of King Cleroff! I have made the exploration of magical and weird natural phenomena my life's study…|Marius|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 101">[[Star Wars (1977) 101|''Star Wars'' (1977) 101]]</ref>}}
'''Marius''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[Vizier/Legends|vizier]] on a [[Technology-deficient planet|technologically-inept]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to his brother, [[King/Legends|King]] [[Cleroff]]. He was also the uncle of Cleroff's daughter, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Risa]].
